p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: -New paint facility was operational at end of 2019 with majority water based coatings replacing solvent based.  Due to COVID related issues, production reduction and general economy instability we are are starting to see some stabilization in 2023.  Material reduction projects are being investigated/implemented in 2023 and will hopefully lead to pollution prevention impact.
